title: Elegant 2-Bedroom Apartment in Al-Malqa
description: Modern apartment featuring high-quality contemporary furniture, smart home access, split ACs installed, and dedicated underground parking. Located in the prestigious Al-Malqa district, Riyadh.

title: Spacious Premium Family Villa with Pool
description: Luxurious 5-bedroom villa with a private swimming pool, driver's room, maid's room, and 2-car garage. Excellent location near major schools and highways in Northern Riyadh.

title: Cosy Studio Apartment in Al-Olaya
description: Well-furnished compact studio ideal for professional individuals. Located in the financial hub of Riyadh, walkable to metro stations and local cafes.

title: Modern 3-Bedroom Townhouse with Yard
description: Contemporary townhouse featuring an elegant small backyard, fitted kitchen cabinets, and premium bathroom fixtures. Secured residential gated block.

title: Luxury Apartment overlooking Jeddah Corniche
description: Premium High-rise apartment with direct, panoramic sea views of the Red Sea. Furnished with luxurious Italian furniture and comes with 24/7 concierge and pool access.

title: Family Friendly 3-BR Apartment
description: Spacious family apartment in a quiet neighborhood. Large living room, independent kitchen, master bedroom with en-suite bath.

title: Exclusive Villa with Garden to Rent
description: Beautiful standalone villa in Al-Rawdah, featuring a lush wrap-around private garden, fitted kitchen appliances, independent driver quarters, and modern facade.

title: Brand New 2-Bedroom Flat in Al-Sulaimaniyah
description: Newly completed residential block with modern premium finishes. Includes built-in ACs, intercom system, elevator service, and surface street parking space.

title: High-End Duplex Villa in Al-Khobar
description: Stunning duplex villa featuring a double-height ceiling in the primary living room, private courtyard, fully-equipped kitchen, and spacious master suite with walk-in closet.

title: Chic 1-BR Furnished Loft near Boulevard
description: Elegant Scandinavian-style loft apartment walking distance to Boulevard City. Comes fully furnished with smart TV, fast Wi-Fi config, espresso machine, and basement parking.

title: Affordable 2-BR Apartment in Al-Fursan
description: Budget-friendly apartment located in Eastern Dammam. Spotless interior, close to local shops and schools, with ample public parking space.

title: Classic 4-Bedroom Villa Al-Hamra
description: Traditionally styled home built in a prime central location in Jeddah. Features high ceilings, marble flooring, private security guard room, and spacious bedrooms.

title: Bright Studio with Balcony Al-Khuzama
description: Sunny studio apartment overlooking the neighborhood park. Well-maintained premium furniture with dedicated parking shade in Al-Khuzama district.

title: Spacious Townhouse for Rent
description: Modern townhouse with multi-level design. Main floor has a guest majlis, dining zone, and closed kitchen. Top floor includes 3 master bedrooms.

title: Executive Single bedroom Flat Al-Shati
description: High quality executive unit in prime coastal Dammam area. Offers state of the art finishes, close access to waterfront cafes, gym facilities, and secure parking.

title: Luxury Penthouse in Hittin Riyadh
description: Ultra-luxurious home spanning the entire top floor. Expansive terrace with a private plunge pool, outdoor seating, gourmet kitchen, and floor-to-ceiling windows.

title: Modern Townhouse near Sea Shore Dammam
description: A magnificent contemporary residence situated 2 minutes away from Dammam Corniche. Fitted with high-end thermo-insulation glass and a private lift.

title: Furnished Family Apartment Al-Yasmin
description: Fully furnished 3-bedroom spacious apartment in Riyadh's booming north. Cozy, stylish living room, separate dining block, full laundry room, and designated car parking.

title: Gated Compound Villa Jeddah
description: Set inside a family compound with shared football pitches, secure access, pool, and recreation clubhouse. The villa features expansive living spaces and modern design.

title: Cozy 2-BR Flat with Yard
description: Ground floor flat with a charming fenced small patio area. Fitted with high-efficiency split units, kitchen cabinetry, and private access gate.

title: Huge Family Villa Al-Malqa Sale
description: Exquisite custom-built villa with a modern dynamic stone facade. High tech smart panels, passenger elevator, private garden lobby, and magnificent rooftop terrace.

title: Furnished 2-BR Apartment near Metro Riyadh
description: Beautiful 2-bedroom home styled with custom cozy palettes. Located walk distance to a major Riyadh Metro interchange. Complete with active security and workspace.

title: Minimalist Studio Al-Naeem Jeddah
description: Extremely clean, modern small unit designed for single professionals. Fully integrated kitchenette and comfortable sleeping section.

title: Stunning Beach View Apartment Dammam
description: Elegant flat boasting full beach views from the balcony. Includes kitchen hoods, dishwasher connection, modern LED spot-lighting throughout.

title: Renovated 3-Bedroom Villa Khuzama Khobar
description: Totally upgraded family classic. Installed high-grade windows, modern water-pressure networks, sleek wood floors, and a lovely front garden.

title: Affordable 1-BR Apartment Al-Yasmin
description: Simple, clean 1-bedroom flat in Riyadh. Fits budget seekers, near Anas Bin Malik road shops, high speed water system, elevator access.

title: Prime Commercial District Apartment Riyadh
description: Centrally located luxury residence with custom bespoke decor. Dedicated garage space is included, along with integrated premium appliances.

title: Ultra-Modern Smart Villa Hittin sale
description: Architectural masterpiece with clean lines. Controls lights, security cameras, pool temperature, and multi-zone climate through Siri/Alexa. Built with premium materials.

title: Family Flat with Park View Obhur Jeddah
description: Spacious flat with views of the park. Quick access to beach resorts in Obhur, secure, and child-safe compound entry.

title: Cozy Townhouse Hittin
description: Luxury modern townhouse with light wells, smart lock doors, underground cistern, and complete modern fittings near high-end cafes.

title: Sleek Penthouse in Dammam Corniche
description: Luxurious penthouse featuring extensive views over the Arabian Gulf. Generous spacing, newly upgraded furniture, and state of the art air conditioning system.
